info.english_meaning: to consult to advise to discuss privately
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' guptaBAzaRe ' ityeva prAyaSaH pAWaH  ' mantri ' iti kutracit dfzwaH pAWaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'sarvaM SIrzaRyaM te rogaM bahirnirmantrayAmahe' (aTarva0 9121) mantrErdUrI kurma ityAha
'mama tvAmantraya gurUn na mAM dozaH spfSedayam' (BA0 vana0 29622) Amantraya anujYApaya
'satyakAmo ha jAbAlo jabAlAM mAtaramAmantrayAYcakre' (CAM0 u0 441) AmantrayAYcakre papracCa anuyuyuje
'Amantraye'traBavatIM gacCAmi svagfhAnprati' ( ) Amantraye ApfcCe anumAnayAmi tvAM svagamanamityarTaH devaH svAmIti nfpatirAmantraRIyaH pativajjyezWamaDyamADamEH striyaH.. AmantraRIyaH samboDanIyaH
'sa kftvA niScaya vizRurA mantrya ca pitAmaham' (rA0 11610) Amantrya sADayAmItyuktvA
'nyamantrayata santuzwo dviScEnaM varEstriBiH' (BA0 anu0 1526) nyamantrayata upAcCandayat
'vidyAnte gururarTena nimantryaH' (gO0 Da0 1254) nimantryaH prazwavyaH kiM Bagavata upaharARIti nimantraRamAvaSyake SrAdDAdO dOhitrAderniyogaH (pA0 33161 ityatra dIkzitaH)
'vyupatodavyupajApavyaBihAsodAmantraRAni gurorvarjayet' (Apa0 Da0 12815) udAmantraRamuccEH samboDanaM yaTA baDirasya kriyate
'gAyatryA cABimantrayet' (yAjYa0 3325) gAyatryuccAraRena saMskuryAdityarTaH upAkftaH paSurasO yo'Bimantrya kratO hataH (ityamaraH)
'praRayantu Bavanto mAM yaTezwamaBimantritAH' (BA0 saBA0 353) aBimantritAH prArTitAH
'tAmuBaya upamantrayAYcakrire' (Sa0 brA0 14134) upamantrayAYcakrire svEraM mandamandaM nimantrayAYcakire
'uSanA vE kAvyo'surARAM purohita AsIt taM devAH kAmaduGABirupAmantrayanta' (paYca0 brA0 7520) upacCandayAmAsurityarTaH
'priyAmanugataH kAmI bacoBirupamantrayan' (BA0 pu0 91835) upamantrayan upamantrayamARaH upacCandayan prasAdayan anunayan
'tasminkfte tadA devI kIcakenopamantritA sadezRA prezayAmAsa' (BA0 vi0 159).. upamantritA prArTitA upacCanditA
'hasanAmupamantriRaH' (f0 91124) upamantriRo narmasacivA iti sAyaRaH hasanAmityatra vAcamityaDyAhAryam
'aBipretapradAnena tapasvijana upanimantryatAm' (svapna0 1) upanimantryatAm AkAryatAm prAyeRAtrArTa upaSabdo na dIyate
